evidence: A must see for psychological horror fans.
The story itself is beyond stuuuupid.
The script and acting were so bad, it was putting me to sleep.
It’s terribly S L O W and BORING.
The soundtrack was lame as well.
One of Mr. Washington’s BEST movies.

summary: The user has a strong aversion to violence and prefers psychological horror, but generally finds most narratives to be boring and slow-paced. They show low sensitivity to production quality and emotional engagement, indicating a preference for straightforward storytelling without much depth.
